data.description: WHITE HOUSE PRESS SECRETARY LEAVITT SAYS TRUMP WILL VISIT CHINA ON MAY 14–15 FOR MEETINGS WITH PRESIDENT XI
WH Press Sec. Leavitt on Iran: Iran's ballistic missile and drone attacks are down.
WH Press Sec. Leavitt: Trump is going to visit China on May 14th-15th to visit China’s President Xi.
Details of weekly share buyback program transactions will be updated soon. Stay informed. #financialnews #investing

data.title: Grupo Aeroportuario del Pacifico Announces the Obtaining of Independent Assurance on the KPI of Its Sustainability-Linked Bonds “GAP 22L,” “GAP 23L,” “GAP 23-2L,” “GAP 24L,” and “GAP 24-2L”
data.description: In Guadalajara, Mexico, Grupo Aeroportuario del Pacífico, S.A.B. de C.V. (NYSE: PAC; BMV: GAP) has disclosed updates on its sustainability-linked bonds known as “GAP 22L,” “GAP 23L,” “GAP 23-2L,” “GAP 24L,” and “GAP 24-2L.” The company has successfully secured the necessary assurance as per its Sustainability-Linked Financing Frameworks, which includes verification of emissions inventory by Ruby Canyon and a limited assurance report from KPMG Cárdenas Dosal, S.C., an independent firm, regarding the associated Key Performance Indicator.

data.title: Groundbreaking Launches The Carina, a 408-Unit Residential Community at MainPlace in Santa Ana
data.description: In Santa Ana, California, a new chapter is unfolding in the redevelopment of MainPlace as The Carina, a modern multifamily residential community, breaks ground. The event was marked by a gathering of community, civic, and business leaders. The Carina, developed by Lowe in collaboration with MainPlace owner Affinius and operator Centennial, will introduce 408 contemporary apartments to downtown Santa Ana. This project signifies the ongoing transformation of MainPlace into a diverse mixed-use hub.
VINCI is enacting a share buyback initiative, reflecting its confidence with IT spending around €200 million.

data.title: Investview, Inc. Announces Rebrand of Subsidiary iGenius to Conectiv, Reflecting Strategic Expansion into Health, Wellness, and Lifestyle Offerings
data.description: On March 25, 2026, in Haverford, PA, Investview, Inc. (OTCQB: INVU) revealed that its subsidiary iGenius LLC has been rebranded as Conectiv LLC ("Conectiv"). This change signifies the company's broadened focus beyond financial education to include health, wellness, and lifestyle products. The shift aims to cater to its worldwide network of members and distributors. Investview, Inc. operates across various business segments, demonstrating its diversification in financial technology and consumer goods.

data.title: IP Strategy Highlights Tokenized K-Culture IP Distribution via WAVIST on Story
data.description: On March 25, 2026, in Gig Harbor, Washington, IP Strategy Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: IPST) emphasized the ongoing expansion of tokenized K-culture assets through WITCH and WAVIST on Story.

data.title: ServisFirst Bancshares, Inc. to Announce First Quarter 2026 Financial Results April 20th
data.description: BIRMINGHAM, Alabama - ServisFirst Bancshares, Inc. will reveal its financial performance for the quarter concluding on March 31, 2026, on April 20, 2026, at 4 p.m. ET. This announcement, including earnings and operational outcomes, will be published and accessible at www.servisfirstbancshares.com. ServisFirst Bancshares, Inc. is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol SFBS.

data.title: Institutional Property Advisors Arranges $114 Million in Acquisition Financing for Fort Worth Retail Portfolio
data.description: In Dallas, IPA Capital Markets, which is a part of Marcus & Millichap (NYSE: MMI) and focuses on capital markets solutions for significant private and institutional customers, has facilitated $113.7 million in financial resources from a life company along with preferred equity for the purchase of three connected retail hubs that amount to a total of 375,000 square feet in Fort Worth, Texas. The Capital Markets group at IPA was overseen by Adam Mengacci, senior managing director, situated in the Dallas branch of the company. Mengacci acted on behalf of Younger in this transaction.

data.title: CUPE social services workers reject forced offers in Windsor and Brant, sending strong message to employers and provincial government
data.description: In Windsor and Brant, employees at Community Living agencies have rejected employer-imposed "final offer" votes, demonstrating dissatisfaction with low-wage proposals. Members of CUPE Local 2345 in Windsor and CUPE Local 181 in Brant voted against the forced offers. This sends a strong message to Ontario's social services sector about the refusal to accept inadequate wage proposals. The rejection reflects the increasing frustration among frontline workers.

data.title: Heritage Financial Announces Earnings Release Date and Conference Call
data.description: Heritage Financial Corporation (Nasdaq: HFWA) based in Olympia, Washington, is preparing to release its first quarter earnings on April 23, 2026, before the market opens. The company will host a conference call on the same day to discuss the financial results. The anticipation is high for this update from Heritage.
